nodes.description: APETALA2 (AP2 TF, integument and endosperm repressor)
Generic cell-cycle output driven by cyclins/E2Fs/GRFs
Duration of cell proliferation window (G-protein dependent)
DA2 RING-type E3 ligase (works with DA1)
Composite GAI/RGA/RGL1/RGL2/RGL3 DELLA-domain growth repressors degraded by GA-GID1 perception
CYP90B1 C-22 hydroxylase (BR biosynthesis, rate limiting)
Enhancer of DA1 / Big Brother RING E3 ligase
Mitotic proliferation of triploid endosperm prior to cellularisation
Growth-Regulating Factor (miR396-targeted TF promoting cell proliferation)
HAIKU 2 (leucine-rich repeat kinase in endosperm pathway)
Integument cell proliferation / expansion setting outer seed envelope
CYP78A5 cytochrome P450 (mobile growth signal promoting integument proliferation)
Multicopy Suppressor of IRA 1 (PRC2 WD40 component)
SEEDSTICK / AGL11 (MADS TF for ovule identity)
Short Hypocotyl Under Blue 1 (SPOC-domain endosperm regulator)
Final seed size (weight, area, length) phenotype
TCP-family transcription factor 14 (DA1 substrate, cell-cycle activator)
Transparent Testa Glabra 2 (WRKY TF, integument promoter)
Ubiquitin-Specific Protease 15 / SOD2 (growth promoter, DA1 substrate)
miR156 (age pathway upstream repressor of miR172)

evidence.evidence_sentence: Sporophytic PRC2 genes strongly downregulated after fertilization or 2,4-D treatment

edges.mechanism: Heterotrimeric G-protein assembly: AGB1 (Gβ) and AGG3 (Gγ) form an obligate dimer; cooperative stabilisation. Modelled as AGB1 stabilising AGG3 (curated direction E133 AGG3→AGB1 omitted to avoid mutual positive feedback per Trap 1; cooperative assembly captured by single-direction approximation).

evidence.title: AGG3
evidence.evidence_sentence: AGG3 interacts with G protein Î² subunit AGB1
evidence.claim: AGG3 and AGB1 form a stable heterotrimeric G-protein complex (modelled here as AGB1->AGG3 to avoid positive feedback)
